name: Internal Funding Tools Registry
description: Internal-safe funding tool registry for matching, review, and workflow design. Contains generic review metadata only.

tools.name: Working Capital Review
tools.description: Internal review lane for businesses with revenue, deposits, and short-term working capital needs.
riskNotes: Recent NSFs or existing daily repayment products should trigger manual review.

tools.name: Business Line Review
tools.description: Internal review lane for more established businesses with stronger revenue, credit, and operating history.
riskNotes: This is a review lane only, not a funding approval or eligibility claim.

tools.name: Funding Prep Path
tools.description: Internal education and prep lane for users who need business setup, banking, documentation, or readiness work first.
riskNotes: Avoid credit repair language and avoid promising score, funding, or approval outcomes.
